title: TESSAN Universal Travel Adapter 28W, Worldwide Plug Adaptor with 2 USB A and 3 USB C Ports, International Travel Adapter for EU, UK, USA, AU, Power Socket Charger for Multi Countries, Grey White
features: 6 in 1 Worldwide Travel Adapter with USB: This universal travel adaptor provides a worldwide AC outlet and 5 USB charging ports. 2 USB A and 3 USB C in total 28W can meet your need to charge multi devices. Ideal for charging your phones, tablets, cameras and more

Universal Plug Adaptor UK to World: Our international power adapter has 4 different plugs, which covers over 224 countries. You can use it in Europe, USA, UK, Spain, France, Germany, Greece, Italy, Thailand, Japan, Asia, Australia, etc. (NOT for South Africa and India)

Compact for Traveling: With size of 5 x 5.3 x 7.1 cm and weight of 149 g, TESSAN universal adapter plug travel can save a lot of space in your luggage without having to take many travel adapters on your trip
Double Protection: This European plug adapter was built in double 10A fuse, an extra fuse included, which can provide double protection for you

Instructions for Use: The usb travel adapter is not a voltage converter. International plug adaptor only suitable for devices with dual voltages or global devices with an input voltage range of 100 to 250V
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Universal Travel Adapter 2 Multifunction Travel Plug 3 Keep Your Device Safe 4 Meet Your Charging Needs With UK / EU / USA / AU plug socket Tessan Universal Travel Adapter Worldwide with 2 USB A and 3 USB C This multi plug adaptor expands 1 outlet to 1 worldwide AC outlet and 5 USB charging ports which allow you to power up to 6 devices simultaneously. It's easy to install and use by just plugging in a wall socket. This portable charging station will meet your different requirements while traveling. Please Note: The universal power adapter is not a voltage converter. Your high powered appliances will need a dual voltage ranging from 100 to 250V, or you may need to use it with a voltage converter. Universal Compatibility The travel adapter worldwide compatible for almost all products on your travel, such as laptop, tablet, camera, etc. The USB C travel adapter can provide the fastest current up to 3A. It is faster than ordinary USB multiple plugs and saves you time. Compact size Size 5 x 5.3 x 7.1 cm, this international socket adapter is compact and portable. The all in 1 entrance concept meets the diverse requirements on your journey and saves you a lot of luggage space without having to take additional adapters or sockets. CAN NOT Push Out at Once NOTE: It can not push out all pins at once After one pin is pushed out, it needs to be RESET before the second pin pushed out, otherwise the other pins will get stuck Specification Input voltage : 100V 250V AC, 50/ 60Hz Maximum load : 10 A Power : 110V 1100W/ 250V 2500W USB A output : 5V/2.4A, 12.0W Max; USB C output : 5V/3A, 15.0W Max Total Output : 5V/5.6A, 28.0W
